## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss content updates, data integration, and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX introduced Clay.com + RB2B integration for ICP tracking and lead qualification](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Arena.im is implementing website changes and CRO tactics suggested by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Budget constraints may limit full implementation of RB2B and Clay.com integration](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Potential exploration of Sales Intel integration with Clay as an alternative](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Website Changes

  - [Arena.im is implementing website changes suggested by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [90% of previously suggested CRO tactics are being covered in the current website update](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Testing of new implementations to begin next week](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Clay.com and RB2B Integration

  - [Jimmy introduced Clay.com + RB2B integration for ICP tracking and lead qualification](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Benefits: Identifies site visitors, categorizes based on ICP scoring, ties to content performance](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Process: WebFOC provides LinkedIn data, AI scrapes profiles for relevant industry/job titles](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Integration requires webhook setup between Clay and RB2B](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Potential cost: $250-$300/month for basic plans of both tools](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Data Integration Challenges

  - [Arena.im currently on RB2B free plan, limited to 200 visitors/month](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [RB2B integration with Clay shown as a premium feature](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Budget constraints may prevent full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Suggestion: Activate tracking only on most important pages to manage costs](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Alternative Integration Options

  - [Explore direct integration between Clay and Sales Intel](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Jimmy offered to assist with webhook connections and custom API integrations](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### CRO Tactics and Lead Magnets

  - [GrowthX shared a document with CRO tactics (calculators, case studies, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [These can be used for outbound motions and exit intent pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Mapping lead magnets to ICPs for targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Next Steps

  - Arena.im to set up Clay.com account and invite Jimmy (<jimmy@growthxlabs.com>)
  - [Jimmy to set up Clay dashboard, ICP scoring, and integrate with existing tools](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Explore potential Sales Intel integration with Clay as an alternative to RB2B](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Arena.im to review budget for potential RB2B and Clay implementation](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [GrowthX to monitor website changes and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Schedule a screen sharing session to troubleshoot integration issues if needed](https://fathom.video/share/K7pTQxSLtcA6GZXPWCpexEKPRwHBt4Cc?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
